summary: Iteration 108: Member Visibility Bug Fixes - All 3 bugs verified fixed. Backend 7/7 tests passed, frontend navigation verified. Admin/Member simulation views correctly show Daily Habits and Affiliate Center links.

minor.issue: Licensee registration missing 'habits' and 'affiliate' in allowed_dashboards defaults. Regular registration (line 1168) has them. Frontend compensates at line 185 but backend should be consistent.

action_items: Optional: Add 'habits' and 'affiliate' to line 5837 in server.py for licensee registration consistency

✅ server.py line 1168: Regular registration includes 'habits' and 'affiliate' - FIX VERIFIED
✅ All existing members in DB have 'habits' and 'affiliate' in allowed_dashboards - VERIFIED
⚠️ server.py line 5837: Licensee registration still missing 'habits' and 'affiliate' - MINOR ISSUE (frontend compensates)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three member visibility bugs verified fixed: 1) All members have 'habits' and 'affiliate' in allowed_dashboards, 2) Sidebar always shows Daily Habits & Affiliate Center even in member simulation, 3) Signal block check works for simulated views. Minor: licensee registration (line 5837) could be updated to include 'habits'/'affiliate' for consistency.
